title: Request for Chapter 31 Subsistence Audit
body:
Date: {{date}}

To: VR&E Case Manager / VR&E Officer

Subject: Request for Chapter 31 Subsistence Allowance Audit
Veteran: [Your Name]
Case Status Stage: {{stage}}

I am requesting a written audit of my Chapter 31 subsistence allowance for the term {{termWindow}}.

My training type is {{trainingType}}, my reported credit or clock-hour load is {{creditLoad}}, and the rate election shown or expected is {{rateElection}}. My school or training location ZIP is {{schoolZip}}.

The current award or payment record appears inconsistent with my enrollment pattern and/or entitlement history. The letter or payment record shows remaining entitlement of {{remainingMonthsShown}}.

Please provide a written explanation of the rate used, the training-time classification applied, the dates used for proration, and any effect of Chapter 33 election or prior entitlement usage.

Thank you.

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
